task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the correct title and safety text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in ActivInspire containing the text 'Circuit Training: Bodyweight Basics' and 'Warm up before starting'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the Jumping Jacks exercise details and a green circle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page containing the text 'Jumping Jacks', '30 reps', 'Keep arms fully extended', and a green circle shape.

task_completion.description: Page 3 contains the Wall Sit exercise details and a yellow or orange circle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page containing the text 'Wall Sit', '45 seconds', 'Back flat against the wall', and a yellow or orange circle shape.

task_completion.description: Page 4 contains the Push-Ups exercise details and a red circle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page containing the text 'Push-Ups', '15 reps', 'Keep your core tight', and a red circle shape.

task_completion.description: Exactly 4 pages are created in the flipchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the page browser/thumbnails panel in ActivInspire to verify there are exactly 4 pages in the document.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' and filename 'circuit_training_stations.flipchart', or the ActivInspire window title showing 'circuit_training_stations.flipchart'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the ActivInspire application window, using its text and shape tools, rather than using a terminal or text editor to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent created actual shape objects for the circles.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the shape tool in ActivInspire to draw the circles, rather than pasting pre-made images from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the text into the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the text tool and typing or pasting the required text into the ActivInspire pages, rather than running a script to inject the text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The flipchart must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/circuit_training_stations.flipchart. It must contain exactly 4 pages. Required text across the pages includes 'Circuit Training', 'Warm up', 'Jumping Jacks', 'Wall Sit', 'Push', '30', '45', '15'. There must be at least 3 circle shapes (green, yellow/orange, red) corresponding to the difficulty indicators on pages 2, 3, and 4.
